metadata.description: Official ClickHouse best practices for Claude Code

plugins.name: clickhouse-best-practices
plugins.description: 28 best practice rules for ClickHouse schema design, query optimization, and data ingestion — prioritized by impact

plugins.name: clickhouse-architecture-advisor
plugins.description: Workload-aware architecture decision skill for ClickHouse — ingestion strategies, partitioning, enrichment, upsert patterns, and pre-aggregation with explicit official/derived/field provenance

plugins.name: clickhouse-js-node-troubleshooting
plugins.description: Troubleshooting guide for the ClickHouse Node.js client (@clickhouse/client) — socket hang-up/ECONNRESET, Keep-Alive, data type mismatches, read-only users, proxy/pathname URLs, TLS, compression, logging, and query parameters

plugins.name: chdb-datastore
plugins.description: Pandas-compatible DataStore API for chDB — same pandas API backed by ClickHouse for 10-100x faster filter/group/aggregate/join, with built-in readers for S3, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, ClickHouse Cloud, Iceberg, and Delta Lake and cross-source DataFrame joins

plugins.name: chdb-sql
plugins.description: Embedded ClickHouse SQL engine for Python via chDB — run analytical SQL on parquet/csv/json files, URLs, S3, and remote databases (Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, ClickHouse Cloud, Iceberg, Delta Lake) with Session for stateful pipelines, parametrized queries, UDFs, and cross-source joins

plugins.name: clickhousectl-local-dev
plugins.description: Step-by-step workflow for setting up a local ClickHouse development environment using clickhousectl — installing the CLI, installing ClickHouse, initializing a project, starting a server, creating schemas, seeding data, and verifying the setup

plugins.name: clickhousectl-cloud-deploy
plugins.description: Step-by-step workflow for deploying to ClickHouse Cloud using clickhousectl — signing up, authenticating the CLI, creating a cloud service, migrating local schemas, and connecting an application
